content:
✔ Weapons (Melee, Ranged, Magic) – Must be legendary, mythic, or literary.
✔ Shields – All shields must be famous defensive objects from literature or mythology.
✔ Armor – Drawn from historical and literary origins.
✔ Consumables – Miscellaneous tools and items that provide buffs, recovery, or advantages.
✔ Magical Artifacts – Legendary relics from literature, offering unique one-time abilities.

📖 1A. MELEE WEAPONS (Swords, Hammers, Daggers, Unorthodox Weapons)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 301 (chunk 301/555)
